title: vibes2019shaders
description: This shader pack gives you nostalgic 2019 vibes. Supports versions 1.7.10 - 1.16.5.
body:
## 🌟 Vibes 2019 Shaders

Miss the clean, performance-friendly look of Minecraft back in 2019? This shader pack brings back that nostalgic, classic vibe without bloating your game with heavy modern effects, keeping the original atmosphere completely intact.

---

### 🚀 Key Features

* **⚡ Potato & Low-End Friendly:** No heavy bloom, path tracing, or aggressive motion blur. This pack is built purely for maximum FPS. Perfect for weak PCs and laptops!
* **🎨 2019 Aesthetic:** Carefully adjusted color grading, rich vibrant foliage, and classic contrasty water that perfectly replicate the look of screenshots from that era.
* **🌫️ Atmospheric Fog:** Custom-tuned soft horizon fog that adds depth to your world without hurting your performance.
* **🩸 Working Entity Hit Flash:** Fully functional damage indicators! Mobs properly flash red for 1 tick when hit, and creepers turn white before detonating.

---

### 🛠️ Compatibility

* **Supported Versions:** Wide range from the legendary **1.7.10** up to stable **1.16.5**.
* **Loaders:** Full support for both classic **OptiFine** and modern **Iris**.

---

### 📜 License

This project is licensed under **CC-BY 4.0**. You are free to share this shader pack on community websites or include it in your modpacks, but you **must** provide proper credit and a direct link back to this original Modrinth page!
